description_long: This is a sleek, modern airplane with a dark, metallic exterior and angular, swept-back wings. The wings are low-mounted and feature pronounced winglets at their tips, giving the aircraft a futuristic appearance. The fuselage is streamlined, with a sharply pointed nose and a cockpit positioned near the front, enclosed by a tinted canopy. Twin jet engines are mounted under each wing, and the tail section features a distinctive twin vertical stabilizer configuration. Red accent lights or markings are visible on the engines and tail, adding to its high-tech look. The landing gear appears to be a tricycle configuration, with visible wheels beneath the fuselage.
description: A dark, futuristic airplane with swept-back low wings, twin underwing jet engines, and a twin vertical stabilizer tail. Red accents and a forward cockpit enhance its high-tech appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the airplane, highlighting the swept-back wings, underwing engines, and twin vertical stabilizers.
description_view_1: Front view emphasizing the pointed nose, forward cockpit, and the wide wingspan with visible winglets and engine intakes.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the profile of the airplane, engines, and tail configuration.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the twin vertical stabilizers, engine exhausts, and the angular design of the tail section.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with sharply swept-back wings and prominent upward-angled winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted under each wing.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizer tail (H-tail) with angular design elements.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with visible main and nose gear units.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single canopy.
